This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Gyroscope: Permissions-Policy header gyroscope=(self) allows same-origin iframes.
  test_feature_availability is not defined
[FAIL] Gyroscope: Permissions-Policy header gyroscope=(self) disallows cross-origin iframes.
  test_feature_availability is not defined
Harness: the test ran to completion.
